title: LocateBiome
description: Adds the /locatebiome command from 1.16 into earlier versions.
body:
### Functionality
LocateBiome adds the /locatebiome from the vanilla 1.16 snapshots to 1.15.2 and 1.14.4 (no, I will not port this to other versions). It will print the coordinates of the closest biome the player specified in the command to chat (see "Usage" below). This mod only needs to be installed on the server to work, however it will also work on the client.

### Usage
Example: */locatebiome minecraft:plains*

You can substitute minecraft:plains with any vanilla or modded biome. The command will suggest you all possible biomes that you can insert here.\
The message that this command will print, if successful in finding the given biome, contains a clickable green text which will prepare a teleport command to the found coordinates which contain the searched biome. 

### Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/hbLIMkPsl_Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack
